title: Kelvin Harrison Jr. Joins Jury, Will Present Golden Globes Prize for Documentary in Cannes
summary: Actor-producer Kelvin Harrison Jr. will join the jury and present the Golden Globes Prize for Documentary in Partnership With Artemis Rising Foundation during the 79th edition of the Cannes Film Festival. Harrison Jr. shared a SAG Award with the cast of “The Trial of the Chicago 7.” His recent and …
